headline: Citi Sees Oracle’s (ORCL) Infrastructure Growth Accelerating
summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) is included among the Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 4, Citi raised its price recommendation on Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) to $330 from $320. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm expects Oracle’s cloud business to remain a key driver of performance in fiscal Q4. […]

headline: These stocks will benefit from China’s AI ecosystem localisation: analyst
summary: Investing.com -- China's government is reportedly planning to invest roughly 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years to build a nationwide data center network, and Citi has identified a basket of stocks it believes will be among the primary beneficiaries.

headline: Steward Partners Recruits $2.4 Billion UBS Breakaway Team
summary: Steward Partners, a large New York registered investment advisory firm, has notched a big personnel win, bringing on a $2.4 billion wealth management team from  UBS  Zelniker Dorfman Private Wealth, based in New York and Florida, joined Steward on June 5, according to registration records.  Steward announced the move on Tuesday.  Steward, which ranked No. 9 on Barron’s 2025 list of top RIA firms, says Zelniker Dorfman is the largest team it has brought onto its M&A channel from a national brokerage firm in its history.

Steward announced the move on Tuesday.
